name: GBT27930IL_SetCommunicationState
title: GBT27930IL_SetCommunicationState
syntax: long GBT27930IL_SetCommunicationState(dbNode node, double newState); // form 2
description: Defines the new state of charging communication.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.type: Meaning for the Charger node
parameters.description: Meaning for the BMS node

parameters.type: Waiting for start of charging
parameters.description: Waiting for start of charging
Delayed start of CHM is initiated

parameters.type: Sending of CHM
parameters.description: Waiting for the first CHM

parameters.type: Sending of CHM; delayed start of CRM (BMS is not recognized) is initiated
parameters.description: Delayed start of BHM is initiated

parameters.type: Sending of CRM (BMS is not recognized)
parameters.description: Sending of BHM

parameters.type: Sending of CRM (BMS is not recognized); delayed start of CRM (BMS is recognized) is initiated
parameters.description: Sending of BHM; delayed start of BRM is initiated

parameters.type: Sending of CRM (BMS is recognized)
parameters.description: Sending of BRM

parameters.type: Sending of CRM (BMS is recognized); delayed start of CML is initiated
parameters.description: Sending of BRM; delayed start of BCP is initiated

parameters.type: Sending of CML
parameters.description: Sending of BCP

parameters.type: Sending of CML; delayed start of CRO (Not ready for charging) is initiated
parameters.description: Sending of BCP; delayed start of BRO (Not ready for charging) is initiated

parameters.type: Sending of CRO (Not ready for charging); delayed start of CRO (Ready for charging) is initiated
parameters.description: Sending of BRO (Not ready for charging); delayed start of BRO (Ready for charging) is initiated

parameters.type: Sending of CRO (Ready for charging)
parameters.description: Sending of BRO (Ready for charging)

parameters.type: Sending of CRO (Ready for charging); delayed start of CCS is initiated
parameters.description: Sending of BRO (Ready for charging); delayed start of BCL is initiated
Sending of BCL
Sending of BCL; delayed start of BCS is initiated

parameters.type: Sending of CCS
parameters.description: Sending of BCL and BCS

parameters.type: Sending of CCS; delayed start of CST is initiated. Is skipped when BMS initializes the end of charging.
parameters.description: Sending of BCL and BCS, delayed start of BSM is initiated

parameters.type: Sending of CST
parameters.description: Sending of BCL, BCS and BSM

parameters.type: Sending of CST; delayed start of CSD is initiated
parameters.description: Sending of BCL, BCS and BSM; delayed start of BST is initiated. Is used when Charger initializes the end of charging.

parameters.type: Sending of CSD; delayed stop of CSD is initiated
parameters.description: Sending of BST. Is used when BMS initiates the end of charging.

parameters.type: End of charging
parameters.description: Sending of BST; delayed start of BSD is initiated
Sending of BSD; delayed stop of BSD is initiated
End of charging

parameters.description: Sending of CEM
